MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Dec-26-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Brent M. Karren of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (213)694-4202, appearing for defendant and moving party American Biltrite Inc.
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff and opposing party Chick Dee.

RULING: DEFENDANT AMERICAN BILTRITE INC.'S FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant American Biltrite Inc.'s for summary judgment is DENIED. Defendant has not shifted the burden under Aguilar v. Atl. Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal. 4th 826, 850. Plaintiff's deposition testimony regarding the number of times he worked on Amtico floor tile in New York versus California is insufficient for Defendant to meet its burden of showing that New York's interest would be more impaired if its policy were subordinated to the policy of California. (Adams Declaration, Ex. E at 235-36, 265-66, 272-73.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Kim L. Avery of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5074 (Tel: 877-451-1580) (503/CML)
